gates.name: leakage_check
gates.threshold: no overlap between injured-cohort 30-day pre-IL window and healthy-control 90-day windows; ABL recomputed from raw pitches per batter-season; no model is trained on injury labels
gates.measured: calculate_abl() reads only pitches table (read-only DuckDB); ROC separates injured 30-day pre-IL day-labels from healthy random 90-day day-labels; healthy pool anti-joined against full injury_labels.parquet ID set

gates.name: median_lead_time_days
gates.notes: lead_time_t75 (operating threshold ABL=75); 27/31 injured batters breach (87.1%); t60 median=44d, t85 median=38d

gates.name: fpr_at_abl_75
gates.notes: Saturation: median healthy max-ABL is 100.0 because calculate_abl() rescales per-season composite by season max. pct_breach_60=89.0%, pct_breach_75=77.5%, pct_breach_85=69.5%. Operating-threshold-based alerts are non-discriminative as currently scored.

gates.name: delta_auc_vs_workload_baseline
gates.notes: ABL AUC 0.581 vs games-played-trailing-30d baseline AUC 0.567. The five-channel leaky-integrator machinery barely beats a count of recent games.

gates.name: seasonal_residual_auc
gates.notes: Borderline. season_day alone AUC 0.289 (inverted -- positives sample earlier in season). Joint logistic AUC 0.716 -- season_day is the dominant predictor. ABL survives the artifact check but the biomechanical lift is small.

hardware.notes: ABL computation is sklearn/numpy/pandas; no GPU required.

notes: ABL fails 3 of 4 hard decision gates (AUC, FPR, delta_AUC). Lead-time passes by a wide margin (42-day median). Seasonal-monotonicity residual AUC is borderline (0.560 vs 0.55 floor). Root cause of FPR failure is per-season z-score rescaling in calculate_abl() that forces every full-season healthy batter to hit ABL=100 at some point (median healthy max-ABL = 100.0). Per-injury-token analysis shows real signal on overuse failure modes (wrist 0.72, groin 0.71, quad 0.66, knee 0.65) suggesting the model has discriminative power masked by label noise (`non_arm` bundle includes paternity, illness, freak collisions) and the saturation problem. Recommendation: do NOT promote to flagship. Retrofit candidates: (1) cross-season pooled-percentile anchoring instead of per-season max rescaling; (2) stratified-season-day ROC; (3) larger 2017-2019 cohort. Source code in src/analytics/allostatic_load.py was NOT modified.
